member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.PreReadEventHandler
member.summary: 读取参数前触发的事件

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.ReadFinishedEventHandler
member.summary: 读取参数后触发的事件

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.PreSaveEventHandler
member.summary: 保存参数前触发的事件

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.SaveFinishedEventHandler
member.summary: 保存参数后触发的事件

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.ISaveRead
member.summary: 读取保存参数接口

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.ISaveRead.Read
member.summary: 读取参数

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.ISaveRead.Save
member.summary: 保存参数

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay
member.summary: 读写方式

member.name: F:ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay.Auto
member.summary: 自动判断

member.name: F:ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay.Direct
member.summary: 直接转换

member.name: F:ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay.NextAndAuto
member.summary: 如果可以递归下一级，则下一级自动判断

member.name: F:ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay.NextAndDirect
member.summary: 如果可以递归下一级，则下一级直接转换

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerObjectReadEventHandler
member.summary: 所有保存读取对象的读操作事件类型

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerObjectSaveEventHandler
member.summary: 所有保存读取对象的保存操作事件类型

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper
member.summary: 用来管理所有保存对象，对所有保存对象可以执行统一的读取或保存操作

member.name: E:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.SaveReadManagerObjectRead
member.summary: 所有保存读取对象的读操作事件

member.name: E:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.SaveReadManagerObjectSave
member.summary: 所有保存读取对象的保存操作事件

member.name: E:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.ReadAllFinishedEventHandler
member.summary: 读取所有参数后触发的事件

member.name: E:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.SaveAllFinishedEventHandler
member.summary: 保存完所有参数后触发的事件

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.AddISaveRead(ISaveReaddll.ISaveRead)
member.summary: 注入一个实现了ISaveRead 接口对象，用于统一读取保存操作的调用

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.RemoveISaveRead(ISaveReaddll.ISaveRead)
member.summary: 移除一个实现了ISaveRead 接口对象

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.Fun_ReadAll
member.summary: 读取已经注入的所有对象保存参数:调用SaveReadManagerObjectRead 事件，遍历ISaveRead集合

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveReadManagerHelper.Fun_SaveAll
member.summary: 保存已经注入的所有对象的参数，调用SaveReadManagerObjectSave 事件，遍历ISaveRead集合

member.name: T:ISaveReaddll.SaveRemarkAttribute
member.summary: 用来标记，判断一个类中的哪些信息需要保存、读取

member.name: F:ISaveReaddll.SaveRemarkAttribute.writeWay
member.summary: 标记的字段或属性，是否直接序列化后读取或保存

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveRemarkAttribute.#ctor(ISaveReaddll.ReadWriteWay)
member.summary: 标记的字段或属性，是否直接序列化后读取或保存

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveRemarkAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: 标记的字段或属性，是否直接序列化后读取或保存

member.name: M:ISaveReaddll.SaveRemarkAttribute.GetReadWriteWay
member.summary: 获取当前读写方式
